en: Now Dinah the daughter of Leah, whom she had borne to Jacob, went out to see the women of the land.
zh: 利亞給雅各所生的女兒底拿，出去要看看當地的女子。

en: And when Shechem the son of Hamor the Hivite, the prince of the land, saw her, he seized her and lay with her and humiliated her.
zh: 當地的首長，希未人哈抹的兒子示劍，看見她，就拉住她，把她強姦，污辱了她。

en: And his soul was drawn to Dinah the daughter of Jacob. He loved the young woman and spoke tenderly to her.
zh: 示劍的心戀慕雅各的女兒底拿，他深愛這少女，就用甜言蜜語安慰她。

en: So Shechem spoke to his father Hamor, saying, "Get me this girl for my wife."
zh: 示劍對他父親哈抹說：“求你為我聘這女子為妻。”

en: Now Jacob heard that he had defiled his daughter Dinah. But his sons were with his livestock in the field, so Jacob held his peace until they came.
zh: 雅各聽見示劍姦污了他的女兒底拿；但那時他的兒子正在田間看守他的牲畜，所以他沒有作聲，只等他們回來。

en: And Hamor the father of Shechem went out to Jacob to speak with him.
zh: 示劍的父親哈抹出來見雅各，要與他商議。

en: The sons of Jacob had come in from the field as soon as they heard of it, and the men were indignant and very angry, because he had done an outrageous thing in Israel by lying with Jacob's daughter, for such a thing must not be done.
zh: 雅各的兒子聽見了這事，就從田間回來；各人都感到非常悲痛和忿怒，因為示劍在以色列中作了醜事，就是把雅各的女兒姦污了，這是不應該作的。

en: But Hamor spoke with them, saying, "The soul of my son Shechem longs for your daughter. Please give her to him to be his wife.
zh: 哈抹與他們商議說：“我兒子示劍的心依戀你們家的女兒，請你們把她給我的兒子為妻吧。

en: Make marriages with us. Give your daughters to us, and take our daughters for yourselves.
zh: 你們與我們可以彼此結親；你們可以把女兒嫁給我們，也可以娶我們的女兒為妻。

en: You shall dwell with us, and the land shall be open to you. Dwell and trade in it, and get property in it."
zh: 這樣，你們可以與我們同住；這地就擺在你們面前，只管在其中居住，來往作買賣，購置產業吧。”

en: Shechem also said to her father and to her brothers, "Let me find favor in your eyes, and whatever you say to me I will give.
zh: 示劍對底拿的父親和她的兄弟說：“但願我得你們的喜悅，無論你們要甚麼，我必給你們。

en: Ask me for as great a bride price and gift as you will, and I will give whatever you say to me. Only give me the young woman to be my wife."
zh: 任由你們向我要多重的聘金和多大的禮物，我必照你們所說的給你們，只要你們把這少女給我為妻就是了。”

en: The sons of Jacob answered Shechem and his father Hamor deceitfully, because he had defiled their sister Dinah.
zh: 雅各的眾子，因為示劍姦污了他們的妹妹底拿，就用欺詐的話回答示劍和他父親哈抹，

en: They said to them, "We cannot do this thing, to give our sister to one who is uncircumcised, for that would be a disgrace to us.
zh: 對他們說：“我們不能把妹妹給一個沒有受割禮的人為妻，因為那是我們的恥辱。

en: Only on this condition will we agree with you- that you will become as we are by every male among you being circumcised.
zh: 只有一個條件，我們才可以答允你們，就是你們當中所有的男子都受割禮，像我們一樣。

en: Then we will give our daughters to you, and we will take your daughters to ourselves, and we will dwell with you and become one people.
zh: 我們就可以把女兒嫁給你們，也可以娶你們的女兒為妻；我們可以與你們同住，大家成為一族人。

en: But if you will not listen to us and be circumcised, then we will take our daughter, and we will be gone."
zh: 但如果你們不肯聽從我們受割禮，我就要把我們家的女兒帶走了。”

en: Their words pleased Hamor and Hamor's son Shechem.
zh: 哈抹和他兒子示劍覺得他們的提議很好。

en: And the young man did not delay to do the thing, because he delighted in Jacob's daughter. Now he was the most honored of all his father's house.
zh: 那少年就立刻照著去作，因為他喜愛雅各的女兒；他在他父親的全家中又是最受尊敬的。

en: So Hamor and his son Shechem came to the gate of their city and spoke to the men of their city, saying,
zh: 哈抹和他兒子示劍來到自己的城的門口，對城裡的人說：

en: "These men are at peace with us; let them dwell in the land and trade in it, for behold, the land is large enough for them. Let us take their daughters as wives, and let us give them our daughters.
zh: “這些人與我們和平相處，不如讓他們在這地居住，來往作買賣吧。這地兩邊都很寬闊，可以容納他們；我們可以娶他們的女兒為妻，也可以把我們的女兒嫁給他們。

en: Only on this condition will the men agree to dwell with us to become one people- when every male among us is circumcised as they are circumcised.
zh: 但是只有一個條件，這些人才應允與我們同住，大家成為一族人，就是我們中間所有的男子都受割禮，好像他們受了割禮一樣。

en: Will not their livestock, their property and all their beasts be ours? Only let us agree with them, and they will dwell with us."
zh: 這樣他們的牲畜、財產和所有的牲口，不都要歸我們所有嗎？只要我們應允他們的條件，他們就與我們同住了。”

en: And all who went out of the gate of his city listened to Hamor and his son Shechem, and every male was circumcised, all who went out of the gate of his city.
zh: 所有從城門出入的人，都聽從了哈抹和他兒子示劍的話。於是，所有從城門出入的男子，都受了割禮。

en: On the third day, when they were sore, two of the sons of Jacob, Simeon and Levi, Dinah's brothers, took their swords and came against the city while it felt secure and killed all the males.
zh: 到了第三天，他們正在疼痛的時候，雅各的兩個兒子，就是底拿的哥哥西緬和利未拿著刀劍，趁著他們想不到的時候，進了那城，把所有的男子都殺了。

en: They killed Hamor and his son Shechem with the sword and took Dinah out of Shechem's house and went away.
zh: 又用刀劍殺了哈抹和他兒子示劍，然後從示劍的家裡把底拿帶走。

en: The sons of Jacob came upon the slain and plundered the city, because they had defiled their sister.
zh: 雅各的兒子因為他們的妹妹被人姦污了，就來到被殺的人那裡，搶掠那城，

en: They took their flocks and their herds, their donkeys, and whatever was in the city and in the field.
zh: 奪去他們的羊群、牛群和驢，以及城裡和田間所有的，

en: All their wealth, all their little ones and their wives, all that was in the houses, they captured and plundered.
zh: 又把他們所有的財物、孩子和婦女都擄去。屋裡所有的東西，都搶掠一空。

en: Then Jacob said to Simeon and Levi, "You have brought trouble on me by making me stink to the inhabitants of the land, the Canaanites and the Perizzites. My numbers are few, and if they gather themselves against me and attack me, I shall be destroyed, both I and my household."
zh: 雅各對西緬和利未說：“你們連累了我，使我在這地的居民，就是在迦南人和比利洗人中間，成了可憎的人。我們人數不多，如果他們聯合起來對付我，攻擊我，我和我的家就必滅絕了。”

en: But they said, "Should he treat our sister like a prostitute?"
zh: 他們回答說：“他怎可以待我們的妹妹好像妓女一樣呢？”
